component.name: SVG to draw.io
component.summary: Convert SVG files into editable draw.io diagrams

description.p: SVG to draw.io converts SVG artwork into editable draw.io diagrams using a shared engine exposed through the desktop app, CLI, and Python API.
When draw.io cannot represent a feature natively, the converter records diagnostics and falls back to embedded SVG only where needed so the rest of the document stays editable.
